artPrompt: An impossible vertical stairwell of beige supervisor desks climbs into haze, each tier identical and slightly higher, a frightened petitioner at the bottom craning upward as cold cyan glow leaks down from an unreachable summit. The recursion never ends, supervisor above supervisor into the fog. Dramatic low-angle film-still framing emphasizing dizzying height and depth, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Escalate to a Supervisor
text:
Choose one —
• Counter target spell. Its controller may resubmit it next turn, fees apply.
• Audit target die roll or coin flip from this turn. Reroll or reflip it; you choose which result stands.
• Return target tapped creature to its owner's hand for "reassignment."
flavorText: There is always a supervisor. The supervisor always has a supervisor.
